'''Baung squad''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] unit of [[wetland assault stormtrooper]]s serving aboard the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Dominator (Victory-class)|''Dominator'']]. Consisting of seven veteran [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]—six armed with [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]], and a [[Specialist/Legends|specialist]] armed with a [[Medium repeating blaster/Legends|medium repeating blaster]]—they participated in the [[Battle of Taul]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|1|Uninvited Guests}}
